profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Sunter Lakeside Hotel Tbk owns and operates a four stars hotel under the Sunlake Hotel name in Indonesia. The company operates through Hotel; Accommodation and Support; and Sports and Recreation Center segments. It also operates a restaurant under Silver Spoon Restaurant, Grand City Chinese Restaurant, Silla Korean Restaurant, Tirta Barista names; a lounge and bar under the Esquire Lounge brand name; and a café under the Coca- Cola Cafe name. PT Sunter Lakeside Hotel Tbk was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia.
